title: El Alto, LP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to El Alto, LP: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

El Alto is a city in LP with a population of 1,200,000. One of the fastest-growing cities in Bolivia, a high-altitude urban center overlooking La Paz with a strong Aymara cultural identity.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
